title: DLatches do not synthesize in AIGER
code_blocks:
module mux (
  input wire select_1,
  input wire select_0,
  input wire in_0,
  input wire in_1,
  input wire in_2,
  input wire in_3,
  input clk,
  output out
);

always @(*) begin
  if (!select_1 && !select_0) begin
    out = in_0;
  end else if (!select_1 && select_0) begin
    out = in_1;
  end else if (select_1 && !select_0) begin
    out = in_2;
  end else if (select_1 && select_0) begin
    out = in_3;
  end
end

endmodule

17. Executing AIGER backend.
ERROR: Unsupported cell type: $_DLATCH_N_ ($auto$ff.cc:266:slice$230)
